title: VERITAS: Visual Verification Enables Inference-time Steering and Autonomous Policy Improvement
summary: VERITAS is a generator-verifier framework for generalist robot policies that improves them at inference time and enables autonomous self-improvement. A pre-trained generalist policy acts as a 'generator', paired with a gradient-free 'visual verifier' that evaluates candidate actions at inference time — steering the policy to better performance without any additional training. The verified rollouts also serve as supervision for offline policy improvement: fine-tuning on verified self-generated trajectories yields consistent gains, reaching efficiency comparable to expert demonstrations while requiring no human interventions.
